shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
Hazard bubbles keep a compact transparent cutout and strong highlight separation.
differences: The rolling hazard uses a horizontal swirl band and four-frame spin.
Dark side bands create a strong rotational cue.
A small trailing spark helps players read rebound timing near rock cells.

context.usage: Moving hazard that rolls across rows and rebounds at walls or rock blockers.

specs.texture: Spinning swirl bands with alternating highlight and shadow wedges.
specs.shading: Flat fill with stronger side contrast for spin readability.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 96x24px with 4 columns and 1 row.
Rotational motion remains readable even during quick rebounds.
The trailing spark never exceeds a 4x4px cluster.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle driven by a row-based hazard system and wall-rebound event hooks.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacles_rolling_bubble_spin_4f_12fps.png during the Loading state and register it with the hazard atlas resource.
runtime_notes: Keep rebound logic in gameplay code.
Snap the hazard to row centers at all times.
Reuse the same atlas timer across active rolling hazards.
